case_title: SUZANNE TUCKER RESPONDENT VS. CHRISTI O'CONNER APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT O'CONNER, CHRISTI AS TO RESPONDENT TUCKER, SUZANNE HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 816812
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-12-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2006 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-06 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEFFREY D. WOHL. (CLERK IS WAITING FOR A LETTER FROM MS. TUCKER SAYING THE CHECK FROM MS. O'CONNOR HAS CLEARED; JUDGE PRO TEM WOHL WILL THEN ISSUE A NUNC PRO TUNC ORDER VACATING THE JUDGMENT.)

PRO TEM JEFFREY D. WOHL, CLERK-BETH WILBER, NOTHING ON RECORD: SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2006 DISMISSED - CASE SETTLED - PER ORDER OF THE COURT THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT IS HEREBY VACATED. CASE IS REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey D. Wohl, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Suzanne Tucker, appearing in Pro Per; Appellant, Christi O'Conner, appearing in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative.

Parties agree to settle the case and Ms. O'Connor writes a check to Ms. Tucker in open Court. The Judge, upon receiving notice that the check has cleared, will order a nunc pro tunc order setting aside the judgment. Ms. Tucker is to send a letter to the clerk when the check has cleared, addressed to Small Claims Appeals Clerk, Room 103, 400 McAllister. The clerk will notify Judge Wohl when the letter is received.

Matter is submitted, no new evidence is identified or retained
